concepts.title: Domain-specific feature engineering
concepts.hook: Task knowledge drives feature creation; often beats automatic feature learning.

concepts.title: Polynomial and interaction features
concepts.hook: Capture nonlinearity and interactions; exponential growth with polynomial degree.

concepts.title: Embedding-based features
concepts.hook: Learn dense representations from categorical data; reduces sparsity.

concepts.title: Temporal features (lag, rolling window, seasonal decomposition)
Filter methods (correlation, mutual information, statistical tests)
Wrapper methods (forward/backward selection, RFE)
concepts.hook: Model-dependent; computationally expensive but captures interactions.

concepts.title: Embedded methods (feature importance from tree models, L1 regularization)
Multicollinearity and correlation cleanup
concepts.hook: High correlation inflates variance in linear models; remove redundant features.
